variants.title: HiFi Filter SAEP 021001 Vacuator Valve
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAEP 021001 Vacuator Valve. Easy to install and replace, the SAEP 021001 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: VACUATOR VALVE, Dimension 1 (D1): 70.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 68.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 38.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 110.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 23.0 mm
